<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `nise generate task-stubs`

- **Usage**: `nise generate task-stubs [-d --dir <DIR>] [-m --mise-bin <MISE_BIN>]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/generate/task_stubs.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/generate/task_stubs.rs)

Generates shims to run nise tasks

By default, this will build shims like ./bin/&lt;task>. These can be paired with `nise generate bootstrap`
so contributors to a project can execute nise tasks without installing nise into their system.

## Flags

### `-d --dir <DIR>`

Directory to create task stubs inside of

**Default:** `bin`

### `-m --mise-bin <MISE_BIN>`

Path to a nise bin to use when running the task stub.

Use `--mise-bin=./bin/nise` to use a nise bin generated from `nise generate bootstrap`

**Default:** `nise`

Examples:

```
$ nise tasks add test -- echo 'running tests'
$ nise generate task-stubs
$ ./bin/test
running tests
```
